info.title: Ecomapp Main-buildTime
info.description: Ecomapp is a comprehensive e-commerce platform API providing functionalities for product management, user accounts, orders, and payments.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including listing, adding, updating, and deleting products.

tags.name: users
tags.description: Endpoints for managing user accounts, authentication, and profile information.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Functions for creating, viewing, updating, and tracking orders.

tags.name: payments
tags.description: Handling payment processing, refunds, and payment status.

get.summary: Retrieve the shopping cart for a specific user
get.description: Fetch the current contents of the shopping cart associated with the specified user ID. Returns the list of items in the cart along with their quantities and pricing details.

example.message: The provided userId is invalid or malformed.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Add a specified item to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. The request body must include item details such as product ID and quantity. Returns the updated cart contents.

requestBody.description: Item details to add to user's cart

200.description: Item successfully added and updated cart returned

400.description: Malformed request or invalid item details

example.message: The item details provided are invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Product ID is missing or invalid

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for the specified user
post.description: Create and place an order for the user identified by userId based on their current cart. This operation processes the order and returns an order confirmation with details.

400.description: Invalid userId or unable to place order

example.message: Unable to place order due to invalid userId or incomplete cart.

details.issue: User does not exist or cart is empty

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order by ID
get.description: Fetch detailed information about an order using the unique orderId. Returns order status, items, payment, and shipping details.

example.message: The provided orderId is invalid or malformed.
No order found with the specified orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Start a payment process by submitting payment details such as amount, payment method, and order reference. Returns payment session details for further actions.

requestBody.description: Payment initiation request including amount and payment method

example.message: Required payment details are missing or invalid.

details.issue: Amount must be greater than zero

example.message: Payment authorization failed or payment required.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Receives webhook notifications from the payment gateway to update payment status in the system. Accepts JSON payloads containing payment event information and returns a payment response indicating success or failure.

requestBody.description: The payment webhook payload containing event details sent by the payment gateway.

200.description: Acknowledges successful processing of the payment webhook event.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid webhook payload or missing required fields.

example.message: The payment webhook payload is missing required fields or contains invalid data.

402.description: Payment required, indicating payment failure or insufficient funds.

example.message: The payment could not be processed due to insufficient funds or payment failure.

500.description: Internal server error occurred while processing the webhook.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product with the provided details, including name, description, price, and inventory information. Returns the created product details upon success.

requestBody.description: The product information to be created in the catalog.

example.name: Wireless Headphones
example.description: Noise-cancelling over-ear wireless headphones with 20 hours battery life.

400.description: Invalid product data or missing required fields.

example.message: One or more fields in the product data are invalid or missing.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number.

409.description: A product with the same SKU or name already exists.

example.message: A product with the same SKU or name already exists.

500.description: Internal server error occurred while processing the product request.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track shipping status of an order
get.description: Retrieves the current shipping status and tracking details of an order identified by the orderId path parameter.

200.description: Current shipping and tracking information for the specified order.

404.description: Tracking information not found for the specified orderId.

example.message: No tracking information available for orderId 'ord-7b3d8f2a'.

details.issue: Order ID does not exist or tracking not available.

500.description: Internal server error occurred while retrieving tracking information.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a new user account with the provided user details such as name, email, and password. Returns the registered user information upon successful registration.

requestBody.description: The user registration details including personal and login information.

400.description: Invalid registration data provided or missing required fields.

example.message: User registration data is invalid or incomplete.

409.description: User with the provided email already exists.

example.message: A user with this email address is already registered.

500.description: Internal server error occurred during user registration.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: The currency code for the price values, e.g., USD, EUR.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this cart item.

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for this cart item.

price.description: Original price for a single unit of the product.

quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the cart.

currency.description: Currency code used for all monetary values in this cart.

items.description: List of items currently in the shopping cart.

payableAmount.description: Total amount payable after applying discounts.

totalAmount.description: Sum of prices of all items before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied across all items.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the cart was last updated.

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning this cart.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this order item.

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for this order item.

price.description: Original price for a single unit of the product.

quantity.description: Number of units of the product ordered.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was created.

currency.description: Currency code for all monetary values in the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Total amount payable after all discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order, e.g., Paid, Pending.

status.description: Current status of the order, e.g., Processing, Shipped.

totalAmount.description: Sum of prices of all order items before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount amount applied on the order.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was last updated.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

amount.description: The total amount to be paid

paymentGateway.description: Name of the payment gateway provider

paymentMethod.description: Method used to make the payment (e.g., credit_card, paypal)

amount.description: The amount processed in the payment

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created

currency.description: Currency code used in the payment

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order associated with the payment

paymentId.description: Unique identifier of the payment transaction

paymentMethod.description: Method used to execute the payment

transactionId.description: Identifier given by the payment gateway for the transaction

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway webhook

paymentId.description: Unique identifier of the payment referenced in the webhook

status.description: Status update from the webhook notification

transactionId.description: Transaction ID as per the payment gateway's records

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

category.description: Category under which the product falls

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

description.example: A high-quality smartphone with advanced features

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

brand.description: The brand name of the product

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the product was created

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

description.example: A high-quality wireless speaker with rich sound

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

stock.description: Number of items currently in stock

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the product was last updated

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier service handling the shipment

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp for the last tracking status update

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the order being tracked

trackingId.description: Tracking number provided by the courier

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

country.description: Country where the user is located

preferredCurrency.description: Currency preferred by the user for transactions

userType.description: Type of user, e.g., customer or admin

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

country.description: Country where the user is located

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the user account was created

preferredCurrency.description: Currency preferred by the user for transactions

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the user account was last updated

userType.description: Type of user, e.g., customer or admin

error.description: Short title describing the error type

status.description: HTTP status code of the error response

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the error occurred

path.description: Request path where the error happened

details.description: Array of detailed issues related to the error

field.description: Name of the field related to the error

error.description: Short title describing the server error

message.description: Detailed message explaining the server error

status.description: HTTP status code of the error response

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the error occurred
